subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto the people who hear, and wisdom from Our companionship unto those who comprehend [3.5s]... ...Glory be unto Thee, O God, O Thou in Whose hand are the reins of all created things and in Whose grasp is dominion of the heavens and earth! I beseech Thee by the light of Thy visage
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لقوم یسمعون و حکمه من عندنا لقوم یفقهون
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transcendence; unknowability of God
